tasks.goal: Harden /view photo uploads by forcing both general and item photo uploads through one shared orientation-safe normalization helper.

Do not add client-side rotation hacks.

tasks.instruction: Update only routers/marketing.py. tasks.rollback_plan: restore snapshot if the total expense modal loses existing interaction or layout stability

tasks.goal: Refine the material and operating expense modal so supplier comparison remains and a 12-month vertical trend chart with 3, 6, and 12 month averages is added.
tasks.name: stats expense category trend view
tasks.instruction: Update only templates/stats.html. Reuse the existing chartDetailModal flow for material and operating expense clicks. Keep the supplier comparison section, add a vertical monthly chart for up to 12 months, show operating expense in blue and material expense in orange where both series apply, add thin moving average lines for 3, 6, and 12 months, remove always-visible amount labels from the chart axis, and rely on tooltip cards for values. Add stable hooks like data-expense-modal-mode='category', data-average-lines='3,6,12', and an id like expenseMonthlyTrendChart.
acceptance: material and operating clicks still open the shared detail modal
supplier comparison remains available
a monthly vertical trend chart up to 12 months is shown
3, 6, and 12 month average lines are present

steps.expression: (() => { const modal = document.getElementById('chartDetailModal'); if (!modal) return false; const modeRoot = modal.querySelector('[data-expense-modal-mode="category"]'); const monthlyChart = modal.querySelector('#expenseMonthlyTrendChart'); const supplierSection = modal.querySelector('[data-supplier-compare], #expenseDetailSupplierList, #expenseDetailBarChart'); const avgHook = modal.querySelector('[data-average-lines="3,6,12"]'); return !!modeRoot && !!monthlyChart && !!supplierSection && !!avgHook; })()

tasks.rollback_plan: restore snapshot if category expense detail loses supplier comparison or monthly trend readability
tasks.promotion_rule: promote after another category-expense modal task reuses the same moving-average trend pattern

tasks.goal: Make the monthly expense detail list simpler and filterable with toggles instead of verbose labels.
tasks.name: stats expense detail list filter
tasks.instruction: Update only templates/stats.html. Inside the existing monthly expense detail modal, make the detail list toggle-based and filterable by item type, simplify the list text, and remove verbose wording like '(세부항목)' or similar redundant labels. Keep the list compact and readable on mobile. Add hooks like data-expense-detail-filter and data-expense-detail-list for verification.
acceptance: the expense detail list inside the modal is filterable by toggles
redundant list wording like 세부항목 is removed
the list remains readable on mobile

steps.expression: (() => { const modal = document.getElementById('chartDetailModal'); if (!modal) return false; const filter = modal.querySelector('[data-expense-detail-filter]'); const list = modal.querySelector('[data-expense-detail-list]'); const text = modal.innerText || ''; return !!filter && !!list && !text.includes('(세부항목)'); })()

tasks.rollback_plan: restore snapshot if the expense detail list becomes less readable or loses item access
tasks.promotion_rule: promote after another expense-list task reuses the same modal filter pattern

tasks.goal: Refine the employee expense chart so left-side amount labels are removed and 3, 6, and 12 month moving average lines are shown.
tasks.name: stats member expense average
tasks.instruction: Update only templates/stats.html. In the employee expense chart section, remove left-side amount labels from the chart, keep the cards readable, and add thin moving average lines for 3, 6, and 12 months of the overall amount. Add a stable hook like data-member-average-lines='3,6,12' on the chart area and data-hide-left-axis='true' when the left amount labels are suppressed.
acceptance: employee expense chart no longer shows left-side amount labels
3, 6, and 12 month moving average lines are present
the existing employee expense cards remain usable

steps.expression: (() => { const board = document.getElementById('memberExpenseCompareBoard'); if (!board) return false; const avgHook = board.querySelector('[data-member-average-lines="3,6,12"]') || board.closest('[data-member-average-lines="3,6,12"]'); const hideAxisHook = board.querySelector('[data-hide-left-axis="true"]') || board.closest('[data-hide-left-axis="true"]'); return !!avgHook && !!hideAxisHook; })()

tasks.rollback_plan: restore snapshot if the employee expense chart loses readability or interaction
tasks.promotion_rule: promote after another member-expense task reuses the same average-line pattern
